chosen_story.title: WhatsApp to let people chat without swapping phone numbers
chosen_story.reason: The announcement of a new WhatsApp feature with widespread impact on user behavior is likely to spark widespread conversations and generate significant engagement on social media.

social_posts.linkedin: In a move that's set to revolutionize online connections, WhatsApp is launching a new feature that allows users to initiate conversations without exchanging phone numbers. This shift away from explicit networking could have a profound impact on our social habits and professional relationships. Are you excited about this change, or do you think it will lead to a loss of intimacy in our online interactions?
social_posts.twitter: WhatsApp breaks down barriers by letting people chat without swapping numbers, paving the way for entirely new kinds of digital connections and conversations.
social_posts.instagram_caption: Imagine being able to connect with someone online without exchanging phone numbers - WhatsApp has made it a reality! This new feature is opening doors to more spontaneous and casual conversations with people all over the world. Say goodbye to the days of awkwardly asking for a phone number.
